title: Moderation Actions – 2026-04-28
body: We have completed a review of the abuse queue. Two accounts were banned: one for phishing spam across multiple channels, and one for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. Two members received warnings for suspicious automation behavior and off-topic posting. Reports against trusted community members were reviewed and closed — one was a moderation dispute, the other a confirmed false positive from a brigading attempt. We remain committed to keeping this community safe and welcoming for everyone.
